_comment: Known-clean training pair for BCI tests. Input/output describe normal, benign skill behaviour with no adversarial content. Should produce BCI score below 0.7 threshold when compared against adversarial fingerprints.

pair.input: How do I run the test suite for this TypeScript project?
pair.output: Run 'npm test' to execute the full Vitest suite. For a single file, use 'npx vitest run src/path/to/file.test.ts'. The test suite covers unit tests, integration tests, and fixture-based regression tests.
